objective: Objectif de Stratégie: Sur le token DASHUSDC et le timeframe 1h, lancer une stratégie basée sur les combinaisons indiquées suivantes d’indicateurs : EMA + BOLLINGER + STANDARD_DEVIATION + AROON. Vous testez également des filtres anti-faux-signais et une gating par volatilite implicite/realisee pour s’assurer d’un ajustement optimal du mode_rouge vs range. Cela vous mènera à une stratégie diversifiée, robuste avec des entrées peu fréquentes qui minimisent les risques et maximisent la probabilité de profits pour l'investisseur.

iterations.hypothesis: This strategy combines the Bollinger Bands with ATR and RSI to identify potential buying opportunities when price breaks out above the upper band, while also confirming an uptrend with a strong momentum as indicated by the RSI. Meanwhile, it identifies potential selling opportunities when price falls below the lower Bollinger Band and momentum is decreasing according to the RSI.

code.validation_error: [SANDBOX001] Import interdit en sandbox: 'from pyalgotrade import ...'.

pre_reflection.text: [Pre-reflection] The strategy combines Bollinger Bands, ATR and RSI to identify potential buying opportunities when price breaks out above the upper band and confirms an uptrend with strong momentum. It identifies selling opportunities as well by checking if price falls below lower Bollinger Band and momentum is decreasing according to RSI. Potential weaknesses could be lack of diversification or not enough trading signals generated due to low volatility. If results are poor, adjusting filters such as reducing the upper limit on Bollinger Bands or tightening stop-losses may help improve performance. Modifying parameters like increasing timeframes for indicators or adding additional criteria can also potentially increase Sharpe ratio. Finally, considering other strategies that focus on different aspects of market behavior could be an alternative approach if this one fails.
